free_text: Evaluated data for neutron dosimetry reactions,
point data
Full documentation of evaluation, tables given
Short version, slightly differing values, graphs only
Evaluation
Least squares fit to experimental data as listed in
Lapenas' book. Experimental data were apparently not
reassessed nor renormalized. The authors' errors were
used for weighting.
Program used: E.Cadwell, D.Hudson, Least squares fit
of polynomials with statistical analysis, CERN 7090
Program Library.
Internally documented by IAEA Nuclear Data Section,
T.Byer, NDS MEMO 129 (1970-10-21)
Errors given represent 95% confidence limits as
produced by least squares fitting program.
Cross-reference:
For fission neutron spectrum averaged cross-sections,
see EXFOR V0003
Taken from tables given in the book by Lapenas
OS.
OS. Mispunch of 1 data point in subentry
.008 corrected.
On. BIB corrected.
